mapper.select: /* UserMapper.selectAdminUser - 로그인 사용자 조회 */ SELECT A.USER_ID, A.USER_NM, A.USER_PWD, A.USER_AUTH, CAST(AES_DECRYPT(UNHEX(A.USER_MAIL), 'RSOS') AS CHAR) AS USER_MAIL, CAST(AES_DECRYPT(UNHEX(A.USER_TEL), 'RSOS') AS CHAR) AS USER_TEL, A.DEPT_CD, C.CD_CODE_NM AS DEPT_NM, A.BIZ_DIV_CD, B.CD_CODE_NM AS USER_AUTH_NM, GROUP_CONCAT(AUS.site_cd ORDER BY AUS.site_cd SEPARATOR ',') AS SITE_CD_LIST FROM ADMIN_USER A LEFT JOIN admin_user_site AUS ON AUS.user_id = A.USER_ID LEFT JOIN CD_COMMON B ON B.CD_CODE = A.USER_AUTH AND B.cd_div = '003' AND B.USE_YN = 'Y' LEFT JOIN CD_COMMON C ON C.CD_CODE = A.DEPT_CD AND C.cd_div = 'DEPT' AND C.USE_YN = 'Y' WHERE A.USER_ID = #{userId} GROUP BY A.USER_ID, A.USER_NM, A.USER_PWD, A.USER_AUTH, B.CD_CODE_NM, C.CD_CODE_NM
SELECT A.USER_ID , A.USER_NM , A.USER_PWD , A.USER_MAIL , A.USER_AUTH , A.USE_YN FROM admin_user A WHERE A.USE_YN = 1 AND A.USER_ID = #{userId}
mapper.update:
UPDATE admin_user
USER_NM = #{userNm},
USER_PWD = #{password},
USER_TEL = HEX(AES_ENCRYPT(#{tel}, 'RSOS')),
USER_MAIL = HEX(AES_ENCRYPT(#{email}, 'RSOS')),
UPD_DT = NOW(), UPD_ID = #{updId}
WHERE USER_ID = #{userId}
mapper.select: SELECT USER_PWD FROM admin_user WHERE USER_ID = #{userId} AND USE_YN = 1
